about.title: A reporting partner focused on operational clarity and durable analytics delivery
about.description: The goal is not to ship a pretty dashboard and disappear. The work is designed to improve reporting trust, team adoption, and day-to-day business decisions.

services.description: Each engagement combines business context, data logic, and interface clarity so the final reporting experience stays useful after launch.

aboutCards.title: Business-first reporting
aboutCards.copy: Dashboards are shaped around the meetings, KPIs, and decisions a team actually runs on, not around decorative visuals.

aboutCards.title: System thinking
aboutCards.copy: The reporting layer is treated as part of a larger operating system that includes source cleanup, measure logic, refresh reliability, and stakeholder adoption.

aboutCards.title: Modernization without chaos
aboutCards.copy: The studio works well when teams want to improve what they already have instead of replacing every report or workflow at once.

focusAreas.label: Sales analytics

projects.title: Open Sales Order & Pipeline Analytics
projects.problem: Limited visibility into open sales orders obscured true pipeline health.
projects.solution: A real-time reporting system consolidated open orders with trend and ownership insights.
projects.impact: Sales teams gained clearer pipeline tracking and faster operational decisions.
projects.shortSummary: A real-time open-order reporting experience built to clarify pipeline value, pricing, trends, and sales ownership.
projects.details:
This sales analytics solution creates a real-time, consolidated view of open sales performance across customers, regions, and ownership. It provides visibility into order value, volume, pricing, and status while supporting year-over-year trend analysis to identify demand patterns and seasonality.

The result is a business-facing reporting layer that improves pipeline conversations, helps leadership spot issues earlier, and supports faster sales decision-making.

projects.title: Performance Leaderboard
projects.problem: Leaders lacked a consistent way to compare sales performance across owners, regions, and periods.
projects.solution: Automated rankings and trend views turned raw data into a leaderboard-style performance system.
projects.impact: Performance reviews became more consistent and less dependent on manual reporting.
projects.shortSummary: A leaderboard-style dashboard that turns sales performance into clearer rankings, contribution views, and trend analysis.
projects.details:
This dashboard delivers a holistic view of sales performance and revenue trends across time, regions, products, and ownership. Stakeholders can track contribution patterns, identify top performers, and drill into performance drivers using a single reporting experience.

It demonstrates how a business website can showcase solution outcomes instead of simply listing technical tools.

projects.title: Time-Intelligent Sales Benchmarking
projects.problem: Current-month sales performance lacked historical context for confident evaluation.
projects.solution: Rolling 3-, 6-, 12-, and 24-month comparisons provided context-aware benchmarking.
projects.impact: Teams could identify trend shifts earlier and make more confident performance decisions.
projects.shortSummary: Rolling 3-, 6-, 12-, and 24-month comparisons for trend detection and contextual sales benchmarking.
projects.details:
This dashboard evaluates current month sales, profit, and volume against rolling historical averages, helping users identify short-term momentum, long-term trends, and performance deviations with clarity.

The solution highlights the studio's strength in time-intelligent analytics and context-driven business reporting.

projects.title: Period-Based Sales Performance Comparison
projects.problem: Teams struggled to interpret changes in sales without clear cross-period comparisons.
projects.solution: A dynamic comparison model showed previous, current, and next period metrics in one reporting flow.
projects.impact: Period-over-period analysis became faster and easier to act on.
projects.shortSummary: A dynamic comparison model built for previous, current, and next period analysis in a single reporting flow.
projects.details:
This dashboard provides a dynamic, period-driven sales comparison view by displaying previous, current, and next period values across key sales metrics based on a user-selected timeframe.

The reporting experience improves planning conversations by turning raw period data into a clearer operating narrative.

projects.title: Budget vs Actuals Analytics Dashboard
projects.problem: Budget and actual data lived in separate systems, making reconciliation slow and inconsistent.
projects.solution: A unified Power BI model combined budget, SPR, open sales, and inventory data for variance reporting.
projects.impact: Finance teams gained faster insight, reduced reconciliation effort, and better budget control.
projects.shortSummary: A unified finance dashboard that standardizes source data and makes variance analysis easier to trust and act on.
projects.details:
The Budget vs Actuals dashboard consolidates budgeted values and actual performance from multiple operational systems into a single Power BI model. It standardizes mappings, resolves source inconsistencies, and provides clear variance analysis across time periods.

For a business website, this functions as a strong case study because it demonstrates systems thinking, finance relevance, and measurable reporting improvement.

projects.title: Hospital Risk Analysis Dashboard
projects.problem: Healthcare risk data was fragmented, making it difficult to identify high-risk patients and operational issues.
projects.solution: An interactive Power BI dashboard consolidated clinical and operational risk indicators into one view.
projects.impact: Teams improved risk visibility, decision speed, and prioritization of care resources.
projects.shortSummary: A healthcare risk dashboard that brings scattered indicators into a single, drillable operational view.
projects.details:
The Hospital Risk Analysis dashboard provides a unified view of patient risk, operational metrics, and key indicators using Power BI. Users can monitor high-risk cases, analyze trends, and drill into contributing factors across departments and time periods.

The business value comes from turning fragmented reporting into earlier intervention and clearer operational oversight.

projects.title: Healthcare Performance & Insights Dashboard
projects.problem: Data was spread across systems, limiting visibility into healthcare performance and operational bottlenecks.
projects.solution: A centralized reporting view combined key metrics into one interactive dashboard.
projects.impact: Management gained faster insight and a stronger basis for operational decisions.
projects.shortSummary: A centralized view for clinical activity and operational trends across healthcare reporting workflows.
projects.details:
This dashboard delivers a consolidated view of clinical activity, operational performance, and key trends using Power BI. It allows analysts and leadership teams to compare metrics across time, departments, and categories with interactive filters and drill-downs.

The case study shows how reporting design can improve coordination across operational teams.

projects.title: Hospital Quality Analysis Dashboard
projects.problem: Quality metrics were scattered across reports, limiting visibility into outcomes and service quality.
projects.solution: A centralized Power BI dashboard tracked and analyzed hospital quality indicators in one place.
projects.impact: Quality monitoring became more consistent and improvement efforts became easier to prioritize.
projects.shortSummary: Quality-focused reporting for hospital teams that need a clearer view of service and outcome indicators.
projects.details:
The Hospital Quality Analysis dashboard consolidates healthcare quality metrics into a single reporting experience. Teams can monitor trends, compare indicators across departments, and identify areas that need attention.

As a website case study, it reinforces the studio's ability to translate complex, fragmented data into usable business reporting.

projects.title: Flat File Comparison Tool
projects.problem: Manual validation of large Excel and CSV files was time-consuming and error-prone.
projects.solution: A browser-based Streamlit application enabled reliable source-versus-target file comparison at scale.
projects.impact: Teams gained faster validation, clearer diagnostics, and audit-ready output without manual reconciliation.
projects.shortSummary: A validation tool built for reconciliation, migration checks, and structured mismatch diagnostics at scale.
projects.details:
The Flat File Comparison Tool is a web-hosted data comparison application built with Python and Streamlit. It supports Excel and CSV inputs, configurable sheet selection, header row controls, multi-key matching, and normalized comparison logic.

The solution demonstrates that the studio can also support operational data confidence workflows, not only BI dashboards.

operatingModel.label: 01 Discovery
operatingModel.title: Business questions come before dashboard layouts
operatingModel.summary: Work starts by clarifying which decisions the reporting system needs to support, who uses it, and where the current friction sits.
points: Source system and data readiness check

operatingModel.label: 02 Build
operatingModel.title: Models, measures, and interfaces are designed together
operatingModel.summary: The studio avoids treating visuals as a separate layer. Data structure, DAX logic, and user flow are shaped at the same time.
points: DAX development with maintainability in mind
Dashboard interface design for fast decision-making

operatingModel.label: 03 Launch
operatingModel.title: Delivery includes readiness for real business use
operatingModel.summary: Handoffs are built around adoption, not screenshots. Reports are prepared for actual team workflows, refresh behavior, and follow-up changes.
points: Iteration based on how teams actually use the report

operatingModel.label: 04 Improve
operatingModel.title: Automation and refinement keep the system useful
operatingModel.summary: Once reporting is live, the next gains usually come from process cleanup, automation, and stronger consistency across teams.

process.title: Understand the reporting problem
process.text: Start with the business questions, target users, current reporting pain points, and the systems feeding the work.

process.title: Model and simplify the data
process.text: Design a cleaner structure for measures, dimensions, calculations, and refresh logic before visuals take over the conversation.

process.title: Design for clarity and action
process.text: Build dashboard views that make KPIs, exceptions, comparisons, and trends easier to understand and act on.

process.title: Launch, refine, and automate
process.text: Improve the delivery flow with automation, performance tuning, and follow-up changes so the reporting system stays useful after handoff.

footer.title: Need a reporting system your team can actually rely on?
footer.description: From sales analytics and finance reporting to healthcare dashboards and automation, the goal stays the same: clearer decisions with less reporting friction.
footer.note: Insight BI Studio combines Power BI delivery, reporting automation, and data design to help teams move faster with less reporting friction.
footer.legal: Serving finance, sales, operations, and healthcare teams with dashboard delivery, reporting modernization, and automation support.
